audit_items.proof_trace: All pointers in filter.c are checked for NULL before dereferencing: LDAP_STRDUP returns are guarded at lines 368, 559, 809, 985; find_right_paren returns are guarded at lines 303, 524, 825, 957; ldap_pvt_find_wildcard returns are guarded at lines 679-680, 730-733; and every call to ldap_is_desc/ldap_is_oid passes a non-NULL, previously validated string. An out-of-bounds read from `*s--` when '=' is the first character (line 566) is a buffer underread of a different class — not a NULL pointer dereference.
